title: [Epic 0] Platform Foundation
description: Schema, auth, layout shell, CRUD factory, storage abstraction. All subsequent epics depend on this. ~21 tasks.

title: Handoff: Autonomous Test Harness (harness epic)
description:
# Handoff — Autonomous Test & Feedback Harness

## Epic Branch: `harness`
**HEAD:** 7cc1f05 (merge: TDD state machine into harness epic)

## Design Doc
`docs/harness-research.md` — 328-search research brief covering Three Loops architecture, Red/Blue TDD, visual feedback, sandboxing, eval-driven development, mutation testing.

## Core Principle
**Computable evidence > skippable prompts.** Every guardrail is enforced by hooks/scripts, not instructions agents can ignore.

---

## Completed (merged into `harness`)

### h77--2 ✓ Test Census Tool (`scripts/test-census.sh`)
- Counts test files, describe/it/test blocks, expect() assertions, .skip/.only/.todo
- Modes: stdout JSON, `--baseline` (save snapshot), `--check` (compare vs baseline, exit 1 on regression), `--output <file>`
- Baseline captured: 32 files, 211 tests, 535 assertions, 1 skip
- **Evidence:** Census JSON snapshot, regression diff on failure

### h77--4 ✓ Unified Verify Script (`scripts/verify.sh` + `scripts/verify-hook.sh`)
- `--quick`: tsc + vitest --changed + census check (stops at first failure)
- `--full`: tsc + build + vitest + census check (collects all failures)
- JSON report to `.harness/verify-report.json`
- `verify-hook.sh`: PostToolUse wrapper, triggers --quick in background for src/server/test edits

### h77--5 ✓ TDD State Machine (`scripts/tdd-state.sh` + hooks)
- States: RED → GREEN → REFACTOR → RED
- `scripts/tdd-state.sh`: init, show, transition, reset, disable, enable
- `.claude/hooks/tdd-enforce.sh`: PreToolUse on Edit/Write — RED blocks source files, GREEN blocks test files, REFACTOR allows all
- `.claude/hooks/tdd-transition.sh`: PostToolUse on Bash — auto-transitions after vitest runs
- Registered in `.claude/settings.json`

---

## Ready to Dispatch (open, unassigned)

### h77--3 ○ Test Integrity PreToolUse Hook
- **Deps:** h77--2 ✓ (census tool available)
- **Worktree exists:** `harness--test-integrity-pretooluse-hook` (rebased to harness HEAD)
- **Task:** `.claude/hooks/test-integrity-guard.sh` — intercepts Edit/Write to test files, BLOCKS if: test file deleted, it/test/describe count decreases, .skip/.only/.todo added, assertion count decreases
- **Key design:** Parses old_string/new_string from Edit operations to detect changes

### h77--6 ○ Evidence Ledger System
- **Deps:** h77--2 ✓, h77--4 ✓ (both available)
- **Worktree exists:** `harness--evidence-ledger-system` (rebased to harness HEAD)
- **Task:** `scripts/evidence.sh` — init/record/finalize/check commands. Per-task JSON evidence with census before/after, gate results, timestamps. PreToolUse on `bd close` blocks without complete evidence.

---

## Not Yet Ticketed (from approved plan)

### Phase 4: Mutation Testing
- Stryker setup targeting server/ and src/utils/
- Per-task mutation gate (score < 50% = fail)
- Thresholds: 70% critical, 50% standard, 30% experimental

### Phase 5: Visual Verification Strengthening
- `scripts/screenshot.sh` — standardized Playwright capture
- Screenshot artifact requirement (file must exist, not just a comment)
- Optional pixelmatch baseline comparison

### Phase 7: Eval Suite Bootstrap
- Mine 20-50 eval cases from git history
- `scripts/run-eval.sh` — automated agent scoring
- Deterministic rubric: tests pass? mutation score? census regression?

---

## Infrastructure Notes
- **Max concurrency:** 5 agents (user-approved)
- **Agent model:** Sonnet for implementation tasks
- **Worktree pattern:** `harness--<task-slug>` branched from `harness`
- **bd tickets:** Sequential IDs (h77--2 through h77--6)
- **Existing hooks:** `ui-verify-gate.sh` (visual verification for [ui] tickets) — preserved in settings.json

title: Evidence ledger system
description: Create scripts/evidence.sh for managing per-task evidence collection. Commands: (1) evidence init <ticket-id> — creates .harness/evidence/<ticket-id>.json with agent name, start time, census_before snapshot. (2) evidence record <ticket-id> <gate> <result> — records a verification result (tsc, build, vitest, mutation, visual) with timestamp and pass/fail. (3) evidence finalize <ticket-id> — captures census_after, computes deltas, validates all required gates have passed. (4) evidence check <ticket-id> — exits 0 only if all required evidence is present and passing. Hook: PreToolUse on 'bd close' that runs 'evidence check' and blocks close if evidence is incomplete. Output format is structured JSON with timestamps for every gate.

title: TDD state machine (scripts/tdd-state.sh + hooks)
description: Implement a TDD enforcement state machine. States: RED (must write failing test), GREEN (must make test pass), REFACTOR (cleanup, all tests must stay passing). State stored in .harness/.tdd-state JSON file. Scripts: (1) scripts/tdd-state.sh — manages state transitions (show, transition, reset). (2) PreToolUse hook (.claude/hooks/tdd-enforce.sh) that checks state before Edit/Write: in RED state, only test files allowed; in GREEN state, only source files allowed; in REFACTOR state, any file allowed. (3) PostToolUse hook that auto-transitions state after vitest runs: if tests fail and state is RED, stay RED; if tests pass and state is RED with new tests, transition to GREEN; if tests pass and state is GREEN, transition to REFACTOR.

title: Unified verification script (scripts/verify.sh)
description: Create scripts/verify.sh with --quick and --full modes. --quick: tsc --noEmit + vitest run --changed + test census check. --full: tsc --noEmit + vitest run + npm run build + test census check + (later: mutation score). Output structured JSON report to .harness/verify-report.json with pass/fail per gate, timing, and summary. Exit code 0 only if all gates pass. The script must be idempotent and safe to call from hooks.

title: Test integrity PreToolUse hook
description: Create .claude/hooks/test-integrity-guard.sh — a PreToolUse hook that intercepts Edit/Write operations targeting test files (tests/**/*.test.ts, e2e/**/*.spec.ts). The hook BLOCKS the operation if: (1) a test file is being deleted, (2) the edit reduces the count of it/test/describe blocks, (3) the edit adds .skip/.only/.todo to existing test blocks, (4) the edit reduces assertion count. Register in .claude/settings.json. Must parse the old_string and new_string from Edit operations to detect changes.

title: Test census tool (scripts/test-census.sh)
description: Create a script that counts test files, describe/it/test blocks, and assertion calls per file. Output as JSON snapshot to .harness/census.json. Must handle both vitest (tests/) and playwright (e2e/) test files. Support --baseline flag to save baseline and --check flag to compare current vs baseline (exit 1 if regression). Count: files, test blocks (it/test/describe), assertions (expect/assert), .skip/.only/.todo occurrences.

title: Booking CRUD API routes
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). server/routes/platform/bookings.ts. POST / (create booking — enforces rules: availability, capacity, advance notice, max bookings, blackout dates, role restrictions), GET / (user's bookings), GET /:id, PUT /:id/approve (MANAGER+), PUT /:id/reject (MANAGER+), PUT /:id/cancel (own booking or MANAGER+). Waitlist: if requiresApproval, status starts as PENDING.

title: Amenity CRUD API routes
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). server/routes/platform/amenities.ts. GET / (list active amenities with images), GET /:id (detail + rules + availability), POST / (MANAGER+), PUT /:id (MANAGER+), DELETE /:id (MANAGER+). GET /:id/availability?date=YYYY-MM-DD (returns available time slots for a date). Rule CRUD nested: POST /:id/rules, PUT /:id/rules/:ruleId, DELETE /:id/rules/:ruleId.

title: Booking + BookingPayment models
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). Booking (id UUID, amenityId ref, userId String ref PlatformUser.id, startTime DateTime, endTime DateTime, status enum PENDING|APPROVED|REJECTED|CANCELLED|COMPLETED, notes String?, approvedBy String?, approvedAt DateTime?, cancellationReason String?, createdAt, updatedAt). BookingPayment (id UUID, bookingId ref, amount Decimal, status enum PENDING|PAID|REFUNDED, paidAt DateTime?, refundedAt DateTime?). Both @@schema('platform').

title: Amenity + AmenityRule + AmenityImage models
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). Amenity (id UUID, name, description, location String?, capacity Int?, requiresApproval Boolean default false, pricePerHour Decimal?, currency String default USD, availableFrom time, availableTo time, daysAvailable Int[] (0-6), minAdvanceHours Int default 0, maxAdvanceHours Int default 720, maxDurationHours Int default 4, active Boolean default true, createdAt, updatedAt). AmenityRule (id UUID, amenityId ref, ruleType enum MAX_BOOKINGS_PER_DAY|MAX_BOOKINGS_PER_WEEK|BLACKOUT_DATE|ROLE_RESTRICTION|CUSTOM, ruleValue Json, active Boolean). AmenityImage (id UUID, amenityId ref, uploadId ref Upload.id, sortOrder Int). All @@schema('platform'). Needs further scoping for rules engine complexity.

title: Parcel model + migration
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). Prisma model: Parcel (id UUID, trackingNumber String?, carrier String?, description String, recipientId String ref PlatformUser.id, unitNumber String, status enum RECEIVED|NOTIFIED|PICKED_UP, receivedBy String ref PlatformUser.id, receivedAt DateTime default now, pickedUpAt DateTime?, photoId String? ref Upload.id, notes String?, markedForDeletion Boolean, createdAt, updatedAt). @@schema('platform').

title: Maintenance request CRUD API routes
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). server/routes/platform/maintenance.ts. Endpoints: GET / (list, filterable by status/category/assignee), GET /:id (detail with comments + photos), POST / (any resident), PUT /:id (status workflow, assignment — MANAGER+), POST /:id/comments, POST /:id/photos. Status transitions enforced server-side.

title: MaintenanceRequest model + migration
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). Prisma model: MaintenanceRequest (id UUID, title, description, category String, status enum OPEN|ASSIGNED|IN_PROGRESS|RESOLVED|CLOSED, priority enum LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH|URGENT, unitNumber String, reportedBy String ref PlatformUser.id, assignedTo String? ref PlatformUser.id, resolvedAt DateTime?, createdAt, updatedAt, markedForDeletion Boolean). @@schema('platform').

title: Announcement CRUD API routes
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). server/routes/platform/announcements.ts using createPlatformCrudRoutes. Endpoints: GET / (list, with pinned-first sort), GET /:id, POST / (MANAGER+), PUT /:id (MANAGER+), DELETE /:id (MANAGER+). Include read receipt marking: POST /:id/read.

title: Announcement model + migration
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). Prisma model: Announcement (id UUID, title, body (rich text HTML), pinned Boolean, priority Int, publishedAt DateTime?, expiresAt DateTime?, createdBy String ref PlatformUser.id, buildingId String?, markedForDeletion Boolean, createdAt, updatedAt). @@schema('platform'). Create migration.

title: [ui] Frontend platform shell + layout
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create src/platform/PlatformLayout.tsx (sidebar nav + content area), src/platform/PlatformRouter.tsx (route definitions), src/platform/components/ directory. Mount in src/main.tsx under /platform/* with PlatformProtectedRoute wrapper. Visual: sidebar with nav items, top bar with user info, main content area. Style aligns with Renzo aesthetic, NOT Condo Control.

title: Platform router skeleton
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create server/routes/platform/index.ts as main router. Mount in server/app.ts under /api/platform with platformProtect middleware. Include placeholder sub-routers for future features.

title: Platform auth middleware
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create server/middleware/platformAuth.ts. Functions: platformProtect (verify session, load PlatformUser via userId join, attach to req.platformUser), requirePlatformRole(...roles) (check PlatformUser.role). Pattern follows existing server/middleware/auth.ts. Extend Express Request type.

title: Cross-schema FK migration
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create raw SQL migration: ALTER TABLE platform.PlatformUser ADD CONSTRAINT fk_platform_user_user FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES public.User(id). Prisma cannot do cross-schema FKs so this must be a manual migration file.

title: PlatformSetting + Upload models
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Add PlatformSetting model (id UUID, key String unique, value Json, updatedAt) and Upload model (id UUID, filename, mimeType, size Int, storagePath, uploadedBy String referencing PlatformUser.id, createdAt). Both @@schema('platform'). Create migration.

title: PlatformUser model + PlatformRole enum
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Add PlatformUser model and PlatformRole enum to prisma/schema.prisma with @@schema('platform'). Fields: id (UUID), userId (Int — links to public.User.id), unitNumber, role (PlatformRole default RESIDENT), phone, moveInDate, emergencyContact (Json), preferences (Json), createdAt, updatedAt. Roles: RESIDENT, BOARD_MEMBER, MANAGER, SECURITY, CONCIERGE. Create migration.

title: Prisma multi-schema setup
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Add multiSchema preview feature to prisma/schema.prisma. Add schemas=['public','platform'] to datasource. Annotate ALL existing models (Service, Event, Advisory, BuildingConfig, PublishedSnapshot, User, Session) with @@schema('public'). Run prisma generate to verify.

title: [Epic 1] Core Communication
description: Announcements (rich text, pinning, read receipts), maintenance requests (submit/track, photo upload, status workflow, staff assignment, comments), parcels (log, notify, pickup confirm). ~18 tasks.

title: [ui] Global search page + results
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). /platform/search with: search bar (also in sidebar/header), results grouped by type, snippet highlighting, click-through to entity. Search-as-you-type with debounce.

title: Global search API route
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). server/routes/platform/search.ts. GET /search?q=query&type=announcement|document|event|forum|marketplace (optional type filter). Uses PostgreSQL tsquery with ranking. Returns unified results with entity type, title, snippet, link. Paginated.

title: SearchIndex model + indexing service
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). SearchIndex (id UUID, entityType String, entityId String, title String, body String, searchVector tsvector generated, metadata Json?, createdAt). @@schema('platform'). GIN index on searchVector. Indexing service: server/services/search.ts — hooks into CRUD operations to update search index on create/update/delete. Covers announcements, documents, events, forum posts, marketplace listings.

title: Epic 4 integration tests
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). Vitest tests for payments, violations, consent API routes. Test CRUD, status workflows, appeal flow, consent signing audit trail, payment-violation linking.

title: [ui] E-consent signing page
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). /platform/consent showing: pending consent forms to sign (rich text body + sign button), previously signed forms. Signing records timestamp for audit. Blocking modal on login if unsigned required forms exist.

title: E-consent API routes
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). server/routes/platform/consent.ts. GET / (list forms requiring user signature), GET /:id, POST / (MANAGER+ creates form), POST /:id/sign (user signs — records timestamp, IP, UA for audit trail), GET /:id/signatures (MANAGER+ sees who signed). Unsigned required forms shown as banner/modal on platform login.

title: ConsentForm + ConsentSignature models
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). ConsentForm (id UUID, title String, body String (rich text), version Int, requiredForRoles PlatformRole[] array, active Boolean default true, createdBy String, createdAt, updatedAt). ConsentSignature (id UUID, formId ref, userId String ref PlatformUser.id, signedAt DateTime default now, ipAddress String?, userAgent String?, unique [formId, userId]). Both @@schema('platform').

title: [ui] Report violation form (MANAGER+)
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). Form for MANAGER+ to report violations: unit/resident selection, category, description, severity, evidence photo upload, optional fine amount.

title: [ui] Violation detail + appeal
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). /platform/violations/:id with: description, evidence photos, status timeline, comment thread (internal comments for staff only), appeal button (resident), fine info. MANAGER+ has status change actions.

title: [ui] Violations list page
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). /platform/violations showing: active violations with status badges, filter by status/category. Residents see violations for their unit. MANAGER+ sees all with unit/resident filter.

title: Violation API routes
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). server/routes/platform/violations.ts. GET / (user sees own, MANAGER+ sees all), GET /:id, POST / (MANAGER+ reports), PUT /:id (status workflow — MANAGER+), POST /:id/appeal (resident appeals), POST /:id/comments. Status transitions: REPORTED→UNDER_REVIEW→CONFIRMED→RESOLVED or DISMISSED. APPEALED can go back to UNDER_REVIEW.

title: Violation + ViolationComment models
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). Violation (id UUID, reportedBy String ref PlatformUser.id, unitNumber String, category String, description String, evidence Json? (photo IDs), status enum REPORTED|UNDER_REVIEW|CONFIRMED|APPEALED|RESOLVED|DISMISSED, severity enum LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH, fineAmount Decimal?, paymentId String? ref Payment.id, assignedTo String?, createdAt, updatedAt). ViolationComment (id UUID, violationId ref, authorId ref PlatformUser.id, body String, isInternal Boolean default false, createdAt). Both @@schema('platform').

title: [ui] Payment management (MANAGER+)
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). /platform/payments/manage for MANAGER+: create charges (select resident, amount, description, due date), view all payments, mark as paid, issue refunds. Dashboard with totals and overdue summary.

title: [ui] Payment history page
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). /platform/payments showing: outstanding balance, payment history table (date, description, amount, status), receipt download. Filter by status/date range.

title: Payment API routes
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). server/routes/platform/payments.ts. GET / (user's payments), GET /:id (detail with items), POST / (MANAGER+ creates fee/charge), GET /summary (MANAGER+ sees all payments, totals). Stripe webhook endpoint stub: POST /webhook. No actual Stripe integration yet — just the data model and manual payment recording.

title: Payment + PaymentItem models
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). Payment (id UUID, userId String ref PlatformUser.id, amount Decimal, currency String default USD, status enum PENDING|PAID|FAILED|REFUNDED, paymentMethod String?, externalId String? (Stripe ref), description String, dueDate DateTime?, paidAt DateTime?, createdAt, updatedAt). PaymentItem (id UUID, paymentId ref, description String, amount Decimal, category String). Both @@schema('platform'). Stripe integration is placeholder only for now.

title: Epic 3 integration tests
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). Vitest tests for amenities, bookings, events, visitors API routes. Test CRUD, rule enforcement, booking conflicts, RSVP limits, visitor check-in flow, access codes.

title: Custom calendar component (CSS Grid)
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). Reusable monthly calendar component using CSS Grid (not FullCalendar). Shows events/bookings as colored blocks. Month navigation, day click handler. Used by both amenity booking and events pages. src/platform/components/Calendar.tsx.

title: [ui] Visitor check-in (guard desk)
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). /platform/visitors/desk for SECURITY/CONCIERGE: search by access code or name, today's expected list, check-in/check-out actions, visitor log history. Optimized for quick lookup.

title: [ui] Visitor pre-registration page
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). /platform/visitors with: upcoming visitors list, register new guest form (name, date, purpose), access code display/share. Residents see own visitors only.

title: Visitor CRUD API routes
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). server/routes/platform/visitors.ts. POST / (resident pre-registers guest, auto-generates access code), GET / (user's visitors, SECURITY+ sees all), GET /:id, PUT /:id (update/cancel), POST /:id/checkin (SECURITY/CONCIERGE), POST /:id/checkout (SECURITY/CONCIERGE). GET /expected?date=YYYY-MM-DD (today's expected visitors for guard desk).

title: Visitor + VisitorLog models
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). Visitor (id UUID, hostId String ref PlatformUser.id, guestName String, guestEmail String?, guestPhone String?, purpose String?, expectedDate DateTime, accessCode String unique, status enum EXPECTED|CHECKED_IN|CHECKED_OUT|CANCELLED, notes String?, createdAt, updatedAt). VisitorLog (id UUID, visitorId ref, action enum CHECK_IN|CHECK_OUT, performedBy String ref PlatformUser.id, timestamp DateTime default now, notes String?). Both @@schema('platform').

title: [ui] Event create/edit form (MANAGER+)
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). Form for MANAGER+: title, description, location, date/time pickers, image upload, capacity limit, recurring toggle (with RRULE builder for weekly/monthly/custom patterns).

title: [ui] Event detail + RSVP
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). /platform/events/:id with: event info, location, date/time, RSVP status buttons (Going/Maybe/Not Going), attendee count, capacity bar. MANAGER+ sees full RSVP list.

title: [ui] Events calendar + list page
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). /platform/events with: calendar view (custom CSS Grid) showing events by month, list view toggle, RSVP buttons, capacity indicator. Click event for detail modal/page.

title: Event CRUD API routes
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). server/routes/platform/events.ts (note: different from existing /api/events which is dashboard events). GET / (list upcoming), GET /:id, POST / (MANAGER+), PUT /:id (MANAGER+), DELETE /:id (MANAGER+), POST /:id/rsvp (submit RSVP), GET /:id/rsvps (MANAGER+ sees all RSVPs). Handle recurring event expansion for calendar views.

title: Event + EventRSVP models
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). Event (id UUID, title, description, location String?, startTime DateTime, endTime DateTime?, isRecurring Boolean default false, recurrenceRule String? (iCal RRULE format), capacity Int?, imageId String? ref Upload.id, createdBy String ref PlatformUser.id, active Boolean default true, createdAt, updatedAt). EventRSVP (id UUID, eventId ref, userId String ref PlatformUser.id, status enum GOING|MAYBE|NOT_GOING, createdAt, unique [eventId,userId]). Both @@schema('platform').

title: Booking rules engine
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). Core business logic for enforcing amenity rules during booking: max bookings per day/week per user, blackout dates, role restrictions, capacity limits, advance notice, max duration. Extracted as a testable service module server/services/bookingRules.ts. Needs further scoping — rules engine could grow complex.

title: [ui] Amenity management (MANAGER+)
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). /platform/amenities/manage for MANAGER+ to: create/edit amenities, upload photos, configure rules (dynamic rule builder form), set pricing and availability windows.

title: [ui] My bookings page
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). /platform/bookings showing user's upcoming and past bookings with status badges, cancel action for upcoming. MANAGER+ sees all bookings with approve/reject actions.

title: [ui] Booking flow (time slot selection + confirmation)
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). Multi-step booking: select date → pick available slot → confirm details → submit. Shows price, rules summary, approval notice if required. Success → booking confirmation with status.

title: [ui] Amenity detail + calendar view
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). /platform/amenities/:id with: photo gallery, description, rules summary, calendar showing availability (custom CSS Grid — no FullCalendar). Click date to see available time slots.

title: [ui] Amenity listing page
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). /platform/amenities showing: grid/cards of amenities with photos, capacity, pricing, availability status. Click through to detail/booking.

title: Epic 2 integration tests
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). Vitest tests for directory, documents, surveys, and training API routes. Test CRUD, role access, privacy controls, survey responses, training completion.

title: [ui] Training library page
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). /platform/training with: required vs optional sections, completion checkmarks, progress bar, content viewer (embedded video/doc/link). MANAGER+ sees assignment controls.

title: Training CRUD API routes
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). server/routes/platform/training.ts. GET / (list — filtered by role requirements), GET /:id, POST / (MANAGER+), PUT /:id (MANAGER+), POST /:id/complete (mark completion), GET /progress (user's completion status across all required training).

title: TrainingResource + TrainingCompletion models
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). TrainingResource (id UUID, title, description, contentType enum VIDEO|DOCUMENT|LINK, contentUrl String?, uploadId String? ref Upload.id, requiredForRoles PlatformRole[] array, dueDate DateTime?, sortOrder Int, active Boolean default true, createdAt, updatedAt). TrainingCompletion (id UUID, resourceId ref, userId String ref PlatformUser.id, completedAt DateTime default now, unique [resourceId,userId]). All @@schema('platform').

title: [ui] Survey list + respond page
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). /platform/surveys (list active surveys with status badges), /platform/surveys/:id (respond — renders question types dynamically: text input, radio, checkbox, star rating, yes/no). Shows 'already responded' if submitted.

title: Survey CRUD API routes
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). server/routes/platform/surveys.ts. GET / (list active/closed), GET /:id (with questions), POST / (MANAGER+ create survey + questions), PUT /:id (MANAGER+), POST /:id/respond (submit response — one per user enforced), GET /:id/results (MANAGER+ — aggregated results). Anonymous responses don't store respondentId.

title: Survey + SurveyQuestion + SurveyResponse models
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). Survey (id UUID, title, description, createdBy String, isAnonymous Boolean default false, status enum DRAFT|ACTIVE|CLOSED, startsAt DateTime?, endsAt DateTime?, createdAt, updatedAt). SurveyQuestion (id UUID, surveyId ref, questionText String, questionType enum TEXT|SINGLE_CHOICE|MULTI_CHOICE|RATING|YES_NO, options Json?, sortOrder Int, required Boolean default true). SurveyResponse (id UUID, surveyId ref, questionId ref, respondentId String? (null if anonymous), answer Json, createdAt). All @@schema('platform').

title: [ui] Documents library page
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). /platform/documents with: category sidebar/tabs, document list with download buttons, version history accordion, role-based visibility. MANAGER+ sees upload/edit controls.

title: Documents CRUD API routes
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). server/routes/platform/documents.ts. GET / (list by category, filtered by user role access), GET /:id (with version history), POST / (MANAGER+), PUT /:id (MANAGER+), DELETE /:id (MANAGER+), POST /:id/versions (upload new version, MANAGER+), GET /:id/versions/:versionId/download (serve file). Category CRUD: GET /categories, POST /categories (MANAGER+).

title: Document + DocumentVersion + DocumentCategory models
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). Document (id UUID, title, description, categoryId ref DocumentCategory.id, currentVersionId String?, accessRoles PlatformRole[] array, uploadedBy String ref PlatformUser.id, markedForDeletion Boolean, createdAt, updatedAt). DocumentVersion (id UUID, documentId ref Document.id, uploadId ref Upload.id, versionNumber Int, changelog String?, createdBy String, createdAt). DocumentCategory (id UUID, name String unique, description String?, sortOrder Int, createdAt). All @@schema('platform').

title: [ui] Resident directory page
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). /platform/directory with: searchable grid/list of residents, board member badges, unit filter, privacy-controlled (only shows isPublic entries to residents). Click to view profile card.

title: Directory CRUD API routes
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). server/routes/platform/directory.ts. GET / (list, searchable by name/unit, respects isPublic privacy), GET /:id, PUT /:id (own profile or MANAGER+). Board members highlighted. No POST/DELETE — entries auto-created from PlatformUser.

title: DirectoryEntry model + migration
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). Prisma model: DirectoryEntry (id UUID, platformUserId String ref PlatformUser.id, displayName String, unitNumber String?, phone String?, email String?, isPublic Boolean default true, isBoardMember Boolean default false, bio String?, photoId String? ref Upload.id, createdAt, updatedAt). @@schema('platform').

title: Epic 1 integration tests
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). Vitest tests for announcements, maintenance, and parcels API routes. Test CRUD operations, role authorization, status workflows, read receipts. Extend platform test helpers from Epic 0.

title: [ui] Log parcel form (concierge)
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). /platform/parcels/log form for CONCIERGE+ to log incoming packages. Fields: recipient search/select, tracking number, carrier, description, photo upload. Auto-notifies resident.

title: [ui] Parcels list page
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). /platform/parcels showing: pending parcels (RECEIVED/NOTIFIED) and history (PICKED_UP). Residents see their own. CONCIERGE+ sees all with unit filter. Status badges, carrier info.

title: Parcel CRUD API routes
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). server/routes/platform/parcels.ts. Endpoints: GET / (list — residents see own, CONCIERGE+ sees all), GET /:id, POST / (CONCIERGE+ logs incoming), PUT /:id (update status), POST /:id/pickup (confirm pickup — CONCIERGE+). Auto-notify resident on creation via SSE.

title: [ui] Submit maintenance request form
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). /platform/maintenance/new with: title, description, category dropdown, priority selector, photo upload (multiple). Pre-fills unit number from PlatformUser profile. Available to all residents.

title: [ui] Maintenance request detail + comments
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). /platform/maintenance/:id with: status timeline, comment thread (internal comments visible to staff only), photo attachments, status change actions (MANAGER+). Real-time updates via SSE channel.

title: [ui] Maintenance request list page
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). /platform/maintenance showing requests with status badges, filter by status/category/priority. Residents see their own requests. MANAGER+ sees all. Kanban-style or list view toggle.

title: MaintenanceComment + MaintenancePhoto models
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). MaintenanceComment (id UUID, requestId ref MaintenanceRequest.id, authorId ref PlatformUser.id, body String, isInternal Boolean default false, createdAt). MaintenancePhoto (id UUID, requestId ref MaintenanceRequest.id, uploadId ref Upload.id, caption String?, createdAt). Both @@schema('platform').

title: [ui] Announcement create/edit form
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). Rich text editor using Tiptap (headless ProseMirror). Fields: title, body (rich text), pin toggle, priority, publish date, expiry date. Install @tiptap/react, @tiptap/starter-kit, @tiptap/extension-image. MANAGER+ only.

title: [ui] Announcements list + detail page
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). Frontend pages: /platform/announcements (list with pinned items at top, unread indicator, search/filter) and /platform/announcements/:id (detail view with rich text body, read receipt auto-mark). Sidebar nav badge for unread count.

title: AnnouncementRead model + migration
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). Prisma model: AnnouncementRead (id UUID, announcementId String ref Announcement.id, userId String ref PlatformUser.id, readAt DateTime default now, unique constraint on [announcementId, userId]). @@schema('platform'). Tracks read receipts.

title: Platform API test setup
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Set up Vitest test infrastructure for platform routes. Create tests/api/platform/ directory. Add test helpers for: creating PlatformUser test fixtures, authenticating as platform roles, CSRF token handling. Write initial tests for platformAuth middleware.

title: CSRF integration for platform routes
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Ensure platform routes use existing CSRF middleware from server/middleware/csrf.ts. Verify token is validated on all POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE platform endpoints. No new code likely needed — just verify the existing middleware covers /api/platform/* paths.

title: [ui] Error boundary + loading states
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create platform-specific error boundary (src/platform/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx) and loading skeleton components. Consistent styling with platform theme. Wrap PlatformRouter in error boundary.

title: File upload endpoint
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create POST /api/platform/uploads using storage abstraction. Accept multipart file upload, validate file type (images + PDFs + documents), store via IStorageProvider, create Upload record in DB. Return upload URL. Auth: any platform role.

title: SSE channel extension
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Extend server/sse.ts with named channels. Clients subscribe to channels (e.g. 'platform:announcements', 'platform:maintenance'). broadcast() accepts optional channel param. Backwards compatible — existing dashboard SSE still works.

title: Platform seed data script
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create prisma/seed-platform.ts (or extend existing seed). Generate: sample PlatformUsers with various roles, sample units, sample PlatformSettings. Runnable via npm script.

title: [ui] Account management page
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create /platform/account page with: profile editor (name, phone, emergency contact), unit info display, email/notification preferences toggles, password change. Backend: platform account routes in server/routes/platform/account.ts.

title: [ui] Platform dashboard landing page
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create landing page at /platform showing: welcome message, weather widget placeholder, quick-links grid (announcements, maintenance, amenities, etc.), recent activity feed. This is the resident's home page after login.

title: [ui] Platform theme + design tokens
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create CSS variables / design tokens for platform pages in src/platform/styles/. Color palette, typography, spacing matching Renzo aesthetic. Include dark/light mode support if existing app has it.

title: Storage abstraction (IStorageProvider)
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create server/utils/storage.ts with IStorageProvider interface (upload, delete, getUrl methods). Implement LocalStorageProvider (saves to public/images/uploads/) and S3StorageProvider stub (uses @aws-sdk/client-s3 — install as dep). Swap via STORAGE_PROVIDER env var (default: local).

title: Enhanced CRUD factory (createPlatformCrudRoutes)
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create server/utils/createPlatformCrudRoutes.ts extending the pattern from createCrudRoutes.ts. Enhancements: UUID primary keys (vs autoincrement), cursor-based pagination (vs offset), workspace/building scoping, platform role authorization, soft-delete via markedForDeletion (consistent with existing pattern).

title: [Epic 3] Amenity Booking & Events
description: Amenity management (rules, pricing, availability), booking flow (calendar, time slots, rule enforcement, approval, waitlist), events (RSVP, recurring, reminders, capacity), visitors (pre-register, access codes, guard check-in, log). ~25 tasks. Needs further scoping for rules engine complexity.

title: [Epic 2] Service & Facilities
description: Resident directory (searchable, privacy-controlled), documents (categories, upload/download, version history, access control), surveys (create/respond, multiple question types, results dashboard, anonymous), training (resource library, completion tracking, role-based). ~16 tasks.

title: Epic 5 integration tests
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). Vitest tests for AI assistant, marketplace, forum, search API routes. Test CRUD, search ranking, forum moderation, upvotes.

title: Forum upvote system
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). Track upvotes per post per user (unique constraint). Toggle upvote on/off. Sort threads by upvote count option. PostUpvote (id UUID, postId ref, userId ref, createdAt, unique [postId,userId]). @@schema('platform').

title: [ui] Create forum thread
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). Form: category select, title, body (rich text or markdown). Preview before posting.

title: [ui] Forum thread detail + reply
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). /platform/forum/thread/:id with: original post, threaded replies (nested or flat toggle), upvote buttons, reply form. MANAGER+ sees moderate/pin/lock actions.

title: [ui] Forum category + thread list
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). /platform/forum with: category list (thread count, latest post), /platform/forum/:categoryId with thread list (title, author, reply count, last activity). Pinned threads at top.

title: Forum API routes
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). server/routes/platform/forum.ts. Categories: GET /categories. Threads: GET /categories/:id/threads (paginated), GET /threads/:id (with posts), POST /threads (create), PUT /threads/:id (own or MANAGER+ for pin/lock). Posts: POST /threads/:id/posts, PUT /posts/:id (own), DELETE /posts/:id (own or MANAGER+ moderates), POST /posts/:id/upvote. Moderation actions: MANAGER+ can lock, pin, hide posts.

title: ForumCategory + ForumThread + ForumPost models
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). ForumCategory (id UUID, name, description, sortOrder Int, active Boolean). ForumThread (id UUID, categoryId ref, title, authorId ref PlatformUser.id, isPinned Boolean default false, isLocked Boolean default false, viewCount Int default 0, createdAt, updatedAt). ForumPost (id UUID, threadId ref, authorId ref PlatformUser.id, body String, parentPostId String? (for nested replies), upvoteCount Int default 0, isModerated Boolean default false, createdAt, updatedAt). All @@schema('platform').

title: [ui] Create/edit marketplace listing
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). Form for residents: title, description, price, category, condition, multi-photo upload. Edit own listing, mark as sold.

title: [ui] Marketplace listing detail + contact
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). /platform/marketplace/:id with: photo gallery, description, seller info (privacy-controlled), price, condition, contact seller button (opens message compose or shows email).

title: [ui] Marketplace browse + search
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). /platform/marketplace with: grid of listings with photos/prices, category filter sidebar, price range filter, search. Click through to detail page.

title: Marketplace API routes
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). server/routes/platform/marketplace.ts. GET / (list active, filterable by category/price range), GET /:id, POST / (any resident creates listing), PUT /:id (own listing), DELETE /:id (own or MANAGER+), POST /:id/contact (send message to seller — could use internal messaging or email). Category management: GET /categories.

title: MarketplaceListing + ListingImage models
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). MarketplaceListing (id UUID, sellerId String ref PlatformUser.id, title, description, price Decimal?, category String, condition enum NEW|LIKE_NEW|GOOD|FAIR, status enum ACTIVE|SOLD|EXPIRED|REMOVED, expiresAt DateTime?, createdAt, updatedAt). ListingImage (id UUID, listingId ref, uploadId ref Upload.id, sortOrder Int). Both @@schema('platform').

title: AI context retrieval service
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). server/services/aiContext.ts. Retrieves relevant building context for AI responses: amenity rules, building policies, recent announcements, FAQ entries. Uses vector search or keyword matching against platform data. Needs significant scoping — RAG vs simple keyword vs hybrid approach.

title: [ui] AI assistant chat interface
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). /platform/assistant with: chat UI (message bubbles, input field, session history sidebar). Streaming responses if supported. Context-aware suggestions (e.g. 'How do I book the gym?'). Needs scoping for UX details.

title: AI assistant API routes
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). server/routes/platform/assistant.ts. POST /sessions (create chat session), GET /sessions (list user sessions), GET /sessions/:id/messages, POST /sessions/:id/messages (send message, get AI response). AI integration is pluggable — interface for LLM provider, context injection from building rules/amenity info/FAQs. Needs significant scoping for context retrieval strategy.

title: ChatSession + ChatMessage models
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). ChatSession (id UUID, userId String ref PlatformUser.id, title String?, createdAt, updatedAt). ChatMessage (id UUID, sessionId ref, role enum USER|ASSISTANT|SYSTEM, content String, metadata Json?, createdAt). Both @@schema('platform'). For AI assistant feature.

title: Payment-violation linking
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). When a violation has a fine, auto-create a Payment record linked to the violation. Payment completion updates violation status. Bidirectional navigation in UI.

title: [ui] E-consent management (MANAGER+)
description: Epic 4 (h77--7mg). /platform/consent/manage for MANAGER+: create/edit consent forms (rich text editor), set required roles, view signature completion rates, export signature report.

title: Access code generation + QR
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). Generate unique visitor access codes (alphanumeric, 6 chars). Optional QR code generation for mobile display. Visitor can show QR at guard desk for quick check-in.

title: Waitlist system for bookings
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). When a booking slot is full, allow users to join waitlist. Auto-promote from waitlist when cancellations occur. Notify via SSE. Needs further scoping for priority rules.

title: Recurring event expansion service
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). Server-side service to expand iCal RRULE into individual event occurrences for calendar display. server/services/recurrence.ts. Handle weekly, monthly, custom patterns within a date range. Needs scoping for edge cases (exceptions, modifications to individual occurrences).

title: Booking approval notifications (SSE)
description: Epic 3 (h77--m8q). Real-time notifications when booking is approved/rejected. Push via SSE channel platform:bookings. Also notify when RSVP count reaches capacity.

title: [ui] Document upload + version management
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). Upload form for MANAGER+: category select, title, description, file upload, role access checkboxes. Version management: upload new version with changelog, view version history, download specific versions.

title: [ui] Survey create/edit form (MANAGER+)
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). Form for creating surveys: title, description, anonymous toggle, date range, dynamic question builder (add/remove/reorder questions, set type, add options for choice questions). MANAGER+ only.

title: [ui] Survey results dashboard
description: Epic 2 (h77--nf7). /platform/surveys/:id/results (MANAGER+). Shows: response count, per-question aggregation (pie charts for choices, average for ratings, text list for open-ended). Export to CSV option. Needs further scoping for chart library choice.

title: Announcement push notification (SSE)
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). When a new announcement is published, broadcast to platform:announcements SSE channel. Frontend shows toast/badge update. Depends on SSE channel extension from Epic 0.

title: [ui] Parcel pickup confirmation
description: Epic 1 (h77--3iq). Inline action on parcel list or detail: CONCIERGE+ clicks 'Confirm Pickup', records timestamp and optional signature/photo. Updates status to PICKED_UP.

title: Docs update (DEVELOPMENT.md, README, CLAUDE.md)
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Update DEVELOPMENT.md with platform patterns (CRUD factory, auth middleware, SSE channels). Update README with platform section and setup instructions. Update CLAUDE.md with platform-specific gotchas.

title: E2E test scaffold for platform
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create e2e/platform/ directory with Playwright test helpers. Add page objects for platform shell, login-as-platform-user helper, fixture creation/cleanup. Write smoke test: login → /platform loads → sidebar visible.

title: Platform navigation data endpoint
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create GET /api/platform/nav that returns dynamic sidebar nav items with badge counts (unread announcements, pending maintenance requests, new parcels, etc.). Returns JSON array of nav items with labels, icons, paths, and badge counts.

title: Reference screenshot setup script
description: Epic 0 (h77--6fl). Create scripts/extract-spec.sh that: extracts cc-product-spec.zip into docs/platform-spec/screenshots/, copies spec markdown to docs/platform-spec/spec.md. Add docs/platform-spec/ to .gitignore. Update README with setup instructions.

title: [Epic 4] Payments & Compliance
description: Payments (fee tracking, payment history, receipts, Stripe placeholder), violations (report/track, escalation, fines, appeals), e-consent (digital forms, signature capture, audit trail). ~15 tasks. Needs further scoping for payment integration specifics.

title: Internal messaging system
description: Epic 5 (h77--vk1). Simple resident-to-resident messaging for marketplace contacts and general communication. Message (id UUID, senderId ref, recipientId ref, subject String?, body String, readAt DateTime?, createdAt). Thread-based. Needs scoping — could be simple or complex depending on requirements.

title: [Epic 5] Advanced Features
description: AI assistant (chat, FAQ bot, context-aware), marketplace (resident-to-resident, categories, messaging), discussion forum (threaded, moderation, upvoting), global search (unified, PostgreSQL tsvector/tsquery + GIN indexes). ~20 tasks. Needs significant scoping — AI integration and forum moderation require architectural decisions.
